/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/forza_cubey.dir/src/audio/AudioEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forza_cubey.dir/src/engine/GameEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forza_cubey.dir/src/game/BuildingGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forza_cubey.dir/src/game/Car.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forza_cubey.dir/src/game/ForzaGame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forza_cubey.dir/src/game/ParticleSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forza_cubey.dir/src/game/RoadNetwork.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forza_cubey.dir/src/game/Skybox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forza_cubey.dir/src/game/Terrain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forza_cubey.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forza_cubey.dir/src/physics/PhysicsEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forza_cubey.dir/src/renderer/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forza_cubey.dir/src/renderer/Framebuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forza_cubey.dir/src/renderer/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forza_cubey.dir/src/renderer/RenderEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forza_cubey.dir/src/renderer/Shader.cpp.o -o forza_cubey  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib libglad.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libglm.dylib -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
